client.label: Borrower side
client.blurb: Walk through a real prequalification as if you were a borrower
client.greeting: Hi, glad you stopped by. I can walk you through a quick prequalification so we know what kind of mortgage might fit your situation. Want to tell me a little about what you are looking at, or would you rather I ask the questions one at a time?
chips: I am looking to buy my first home
I want to refinance or pull equity
I am self-employed, can you still prequalify me?
I have had some credit issues, do I have options?

professional.label: Broker side
professional.blurb: See how this would work on your own website
professional.greeting: Hey, take a look around. This is a working prequalifier you can drop onto your own site. It runs a borrower through a real intake, scores the file on the back end, and sends you a clean summary so you only spend time on files worth your time. Ask me how any piece of that works.
chips: How does the prequalification scoring work?
What does the broker handoff look like?
Can it handle alt and private lending scenarios?
What does it cost to set up?

disclaimer.checkbox: This AI prequalifier provides general information only. It is not a mortgage approval, a commitment, or financial, legal, or tax advice.
disclaimer.footer: AI prequalification systems we build for mortgage brokers are custom-designed to comply with the jurisdiction the broker is licensed to operate in.
